_comment: Tier-1 mcp_tool source presets for emerald-exchange (AU-KG.ingest.mcp-tool-connector). Sync live trading records into the KG via the emerald-exchange MCP server. The primary/maximum-ingestion path is the native emerald_ingest_snapshot tool (typed :Portfolio/:Position/:Instrument/:Quote/:MarketBar/:Trade nodes); this declarative preset mirrors open positions as documents. Contributed presets win over the central MCP_TOOL_PRESETS.
